title: Connected Softer Wool
body:
# Connected Softer Wool
Makes wool and carpets connected

## Preview
![Pack Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cccce4ca4984903be588b7e0716cbfb7e487ac5a.png)

## Requirements
This pack **supports vanilla version** of the game, however you need to get **Continuity (For Fabric)** or **Optifine (For Forge)** in order to support connected textures
